project.name: tanstack_start_ts
project.description: A modern graduation invitation website built with React 19, TanStack Start, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

nodes.name: src/components/ui/button.tsx
nodes.summary: Shadcn/ui-style Button component with variant and size props, built with class-variance-authority and Radix Slot for polymorphic rendering.

nodes.name: src/components/ui/carousel.tsx
nodes.summary: Accessible carousel component built on Embla Carousel with custom navigation buttons and keyboard support, providing scroll state via React Context.

nodes.name: src/lib/utils.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS class merging utility combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional class name handling.

nodes.name: src/main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point that mounts the TanStack Router provider into the DOM root element.

nodes.name: src/routeTree.gen.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated TanStack Router route tree defining two routes: index (/) and memory detail (/memory/$slug).

nodes.name: src/router.tsx
nodes.summary: Router factory function that creates a TanStack Router instance with the generated route tree and scroll restoration enabled.

nodes.name: src/routes/__root.tsx
nodes.summary: Root route layout with 404 not-found page, error boundary component with retry, 3D graduation cap animation, and Outlet for child routes.

nodes.name: src/routes/memory.$slug.tsx
nodes.summary: Dynamic memory detail page with image carousel, lazy-loaded images with skeleton placeholders, and animated page transitions using Framer Motion.

nodes.name: Button
nodes.summary: Polymorphic button component supporting variant, size, and asChild props via Radix Slot.

nodes.name: Carousel
nodes.summary: Main carousel container managing Embla instance, scroll state, and keyboard navigation.

nodes.name: CarouselContent
nodes.summary: Carousel content wrapper that renders the scrollable track.

nodes.name: CarouselItem
nodes.summary: Individual carousel slide with full-width basis and role='group' for accessibility.

nodes.name: CarouselNext
nodes.summary: Next slide navigation button with ArrowRight icon, positioned absolutely.

nodes.name: CarouselPrevious
nodes.summary: Previous slide navigation button with ArrowLeft icon, positioned absolutely.

nodes.name: useCarousel
nodes.summary: Custom hook consuming CarouselContext; throws if used outside a Carousel.

nodes.name: cn
nodes.summary: Merges Tailwind CSS classes using clsx for conditional logic and tailwind-merge for conflict resolution.

nodes.name: getRouter
nodes.summary: Creates and returns a TanStack Router instance with the generated route tree and scroll restoration.

nodes.name: ErrorComponent
nodes.summary: Error boundary UI showing error message with try-again and go-home buttons.

nodes.name: NotFoundComponent
nodes.summary: 404 not-found page with a large heading, description, and go-home link.

nodes.name: RootComponent
nodes.summary: Root layout rendering HeadContent, Suspense-wrapped 3D graduation cap, and child route Outlet.

nodes.name: ImageWithSkeleton
nodes.summary: Lazy-loaded image with gradient overlay, skeleton placeholder, and caption badge.

nodes.name: MemoryDetail
nodes.summary: Memory detail page displaying an image carousel, title, detail text, and animated Framer Motion entrance.

nodes.name: About.tsx
nodes.summary: About section component that shares the graduate's university journey story. Renders a motion-animated heading, a personal narrative paragraph, and a grid of milestone cards using Reveal/RevealItem for staggered scroll-animated entry.

nodes.name: Footer.tsx
nodes.summary: Footer component displaying a gratitude message, dynamic copyright year, and the graduate's name, university, and degree program. Styled with a rounded card inside a bordered container.

nodes.name: Navbar.tsx
nodes.summary: Fixed-position navigation bar with desktop link list, mobile hamburger menu with animated drawer, theme toggle button, and a 'Send Wishes' CTA. Uses Framer Motion for entrance, hover, and menu stagger animations.

nodes.name: ThemeToggle.tsx
nodes.summary: Dark/light mode toggle button that uses React's useSyncExternalStore with a MutationObserver on <html> class attribute. Persists the selection to localStorage and renders Sun/Moon icons from lucide-react.

nodes.name: Timeline.tsx
nodes.summary: Event schedule section with scroll-driven 3D card animations. Each TimelineCard uses framer-motion useScroll/useTransform to map scroll progress to rotateY and y-offset. Renders a 5-item timeline from guest arrival through dinner.

nodes.name: index.tsx
nodes.summary: Home page route definition with structured data SEO metadata (schema.org Event), canonical URL, OG tags, and the Index layout component that composes all portfolio sections (Navbar, Hero, Invitation, About, EventDetails, Gallery, Timeline, RSVP, Footer).

nodes.name: About
nodes.summary: Renders the 'About' section with a journey narrative, motion-animated heading, and a milestone card grid.

nodes.name: Footer
nodes.summary: Renders the page footer with gratitude message, copyright, and university attribution.

nodes.name: Navbar
nodes.summary: Renders the top navigation bar with animated links, mobile menu, theme toggle, and CTA button.

nodes.name: getThemeSnapshot
nodes.summary: Returns whether the document currently has the 'dark' class.

nodes.name: subscribeToTheme
nodes.summary: Sets up a MutationObserver on <html> class changes and returns a cleanup disconnect function.

nodes.name: ThemeToggle
nodes.summary: Renders a toggle button that switches dark/light mode via classList and localStorage.

nodes.name: TimelineCard
nodes.summary: Renders a single timeline event card with scroll-driven 3D perspective animation using useScroll/useTransform.

nodes.name: Timeline
nodes.summary: Renders the full event schedule section with SectionTitle, Reveal container, and a grid of TimelineCards.

nodes.name: Index
nodes.summary: Renders the main page layout composing all portfolio sections in order.

nodes.name: Route
nodes.summary: TanStack Router route configuration for '/' with SEO meta tags, canonical link, and structured data JSON-LD for schema.org Event.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project documentation covering prerequisites, setup instructions (clone, install, run), available scripts, sections overview, tech stack (React 19, TanStack Start, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion 12), project structure tree, configuration notes, and troubleshooting

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point with Google Fonts preconnect (Great Vibes, Inter, Playfair Display) and root div for React SPA

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest with scripts (dev, build, preview, lint, format, test), dependencies (React 19, TanStack Router, Framer Motion 12, Tailwind CSS v4, Three.js, EmailJS, Embla Carousel) and devDependencies (TypeScript, ESLint, Prettier, Vitest, Vite 7)

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration targeting ES2022 with react-jsx, bundler module resolution, strict mode, and @/* path alias mapping to ./src/*

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment config with SPA rewrites (all routes to /index.html)

nodes.name: .cursor/rules/codegraph.mdc
nodes.summary: Cursor rule defining CodeGraph MCP server usage guidelines for the AI assistant.

nodes.name: .prettierignore
nodes.summary: Prettier formatting exclusion list (node_modules, dist, lock files, routeTree.gen.ts).

nodes.name: .understand-anything/.understandignore
nodes.summary: Exclusion patterns for understand-anything analysis tool.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config with TypeScript, React hooks, React Refresh, and Prettier integration.

nodes.name: src/components/portfolio/GraduationCap3D.tsx
nodes.summary: 3D graduation cap using Three.js (react-three-fiber/drei) rendered as a fixed background decoration.

nodes.name: src/components/portfolio/Signature.tsx
nodes.summary: Animated SVG signature with framer-motion path drawing animations.

nodes.name: src/env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declarations for Vite env vars (EMAILJS_*).

nodes.name: src/hooks/use-mobile.tsx
nodes.summary: React hook that detects mobile viewport via matchMedia(768px breakpoint).

nodes.name: src/styles.css
nodes.summary: Tailwind v4 CSS entry with custom theme variables, dark mode, and base layer styles.

nodes.name: src/test/setup.ts
nodes.summary: Test environment setup with jest-dom matchers, mock IntersectionObserver, and mock matchMedia.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build config with TanStack Router, React, Tailwind CSS, and tsconfig-paths plugins.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner config with jsdom environment, globals, and setup file reference.

nodes.name: Gallery.tsx
nodes.summary: Gallery section displaying project cards in a responsive grid with scroll-reveal animations.

nodes.name: Hero.tsx
nodes.summary: Hero section with particle field background, invitation text, and animated scroll indicator.

nodes.name: ParticleField.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive particle animation canvas background using canvas API.

nodes.name: ProjectCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Reveal-animated project card displaying a memory with image and description.

nodes.name: Reveal.tsx
nodes.summary: Scroll-triggered reveal animation wrapper using framer-motion for staggered entry.

nodes.name: use-mouse-tilt.ts
nodes.summary: Custom hook that tracks mouse position relative to an element for tilt/parallax effects.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: All React UI components including reusable primitives (Button, Carousel) and portfolio section components (Hero, About, Gallery, Timeline, RSVP, Navbar, etc.) that compose the graduation invitation page.

layers.name: Application Core
layers.description: Application entry point, TanStack Router setup, auto-generated route tree, page routes (index and memory detail), root layout with error boundary, HTML shell, global Tailwind stylesheet, and TypeScript environment declarations.

layers.name: Hooks & Utilities
layers.description: Shared custom React hooks (mobile detection, mouse tilt/parallax), Tailwind CSS class merging utility (cn), and Vitest test setup file with global mocks.

layers.name: Project Configuration
layers.description: Core project metadata and TypeScript configuration including package.json dependencies and scripts, TypeScript compiler options with path aliases, and environment variable template for EmailJS integration.

layers.name: Build & Tool System
layers.description: Build toolchain configuration including Vite bundler with plugins, Vitest test runner with jsdom environment, ESLint flat config with React/TypeScript rules, Prettier ignore rules, Cursor IDE codegraph rules, and understand-anything analysis tool exclusions.

layers.name: Infrastructure & Documentation
layers.description: Vercel deployment configuration with SPA rewrite rules and project README documentation covering setup, scripts, tech stack, and troubleshooting.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: Start here: src/main.tsx mounts the TanStack Router provider into the DOM root from index.html. The HTML shell preloads Google Fonts (Great Vibes, Inter, Playfair Display) for the typography-heavy invitation design.

tour.title: Router & Auto-Generated Route Tree
tour.description: src/router.tsx creates the TanStack Router instance with scroll restoration. The route tree is auto-generated at src/routeTree.gen.ts â€” it defines exactly two routes: the home page (/) and a dynamic memory detail page (/memory/$slug).

tour.title: Root Layout & Global Styling
tour.description: src/routes/__root.tsx is the layout shell wrapping all routes: it renders a 3D graduation cap (Three.js), global HeadContent, a Suspense boundary, error/404 components with retry buttons, and the Outlet for child routes. src/styles.css is the Tailwind v4 entry with custom theme variables and dark mode.

tour.title: Page Routes: Home & Memory Detail
tour.description: src/routes/index.tsx composes all portfolio sections (Navbar, Hero, Invitation, About, EventDetails, Gallery, Timeline, RSVP, Footer) into a single-page layout with SEO metadata (schema.org Event JSON-LD). src/routes/memory.$slug.tsx is the secondary route â€” a dynamic detail page with an Embla-based image carousel, lazy-loaded images with skeleton placeholders, and Framer Motion page transitions.

tour.title: Portfolio Section Components
tour.description: These components compose the home page: Hero (particle background + invitation text + scroll indicator), Invitation (graduate details), About (journey story with milestone cards), EventDetails (date/time/venue), Gallery (memory cards linking to detail route), Timeline (scroll-driven 3D event schedule cards), RSVP (EmailJS contact form), Navbar (fixed nav with mobile drawer + theme toggle), and Footer (copyright attribution).

tour.title: Shared UI Primitives & Utilities
tour.description: Under src/components/ui/: button.tsx is a shadcn/ui-style polymorphic Button using class-variance-authority and Radix Slot; carousel.tsx is a full-featured accessible carousel built on Embla. The cn utility in src/lib/utils.ts merges Tailwind classes using clsx + tailwind-merge â€” used by every component.

tour.title: Custom Hooks & Animation System
tour.description: Reusable hooks: use-mobile.tsx detects mobile viewport at 768px, use-mouse-tilt.ts tracks mouse position for parallax/tilt effects. The Reveal.tsx component is a scroll-triggered Framer Motion wrapper used across sections for staggered entrance animations. ParticleField.tsx draws an interactive canvas particle background, ThemeToggle.tsx persists dark/light mode via localStorage and MutationObserver.

tour.title: Configuration, Tooling & Documentation
tour.description: Top-level config: package.json defines deps (React 19, TanStack Router, Framer Motion 12, Three.js, Embla, EmailJS, Tailwind v4) and scripts; tsconfig.json sets strict mode with @/* path alias; vite.config.ts wires TanStack Router + Tailwind + React plugins; vitest.config.ts configures jsdom test environment; vercel.json deploys with SPA rewrites. README.md ties it all together â€” the best starting point for new contributors.
